name: Communicating for a Changing Planet
raw_prereq: Seventh College students only, completion of UC Entry Level Writing requirement, must be taken for a letter grade to count toward Seventh College general-education requirements. Duplicate credit with SYN 1R.

name: Communicating for a Changing Planet
raw_prereq: Seventh College students only, completion of UC Entry Level Writing requirement, must be taken for a letter grade to count toward Seventh College general-education requirements. Duplicate credit with SYN 1.

name: Inquiring about a Changing Planet
raw_prereq: Seventh College students only, SYN 1/1R, must be taken for a letter grade to count toward Seventh College general-education requirements. Duplicate credit with SYN 2R.

name: Inquiring about a Changing Planet
raw_prereq: Seventh College students only, SYN 1/1R, must be taken for a letter grade to count toward Seventh College general-education requirements. Duplicate credit with SYN 2.

name: Engaging with a Changing Planet
raw_prereq: restricted to Seventh College students only, upper-division standing, completion of SYN 1/1R and SYN 2/2R, must be taken for a letter grade to count toward Seventh College general-education requirements.

name: Engaging with a Changing Planet Global Seminar
raw_prereq: upper-division standing, completion of SYN 1/1R and SYN 2/2R, must be taken for a letter grade to count toward Seventh College general-education requirements. Students must apply and be accepted to the Global Seminar Program to enroll. Duplicate credit with SYN 100.

name: Defining the Scope of a Changing Planet
raw_prereq: restricted to Seventh College transfer students only, must be taken for a letter grade to count toward Seventh College high-impact requirement, cannot be taken concurrently or after SYN 100. Duplicate credit with SYN 150R.

name: Defining the Scope of a Changing Planet
raw_prereq: restricted to Seventh College transfer students only, must be taken for a letter grade to count toward Seventh College high-impact requirement, cannot be taken concurrently or after SYN 100. Duplicate credit with SYN 150.

name: Instruction in Project-Based Learning Management
raw_prereq: completion of SYN 100, restricted to upper-division Seventh College students only, must be taken P/NP only, can be taken once for credit, a student application and departmental approval is required for enrollment, enrollment satisfies the Seventh College high-impact requirement.

name: Directed Group Study
raw_prereq: completion of SYN 100, restricted to upper-division Seventh College students only, must be taken P/NP only, can be taken up to two times for credit, must complete at least ninety units with a 2.5 GPA in upper-division undergraduate courses at UC San Diego, department approval for the entire group is required, enrollment satisfies the Seventh College high-impact requirement.

name: Independent Study
raw_prereq: completion of SYN 100, restricted to upper-division Seventh College students only, must be taken P/NP only, can be taken up to two times for credit, must complete at least ninety units with a 2.5 GPA in upper-division undergraduate courses at UC San Diego, department approval is required, enrollment satisfies the Seventh College high-impact requirement.
